name: Kent Masters
background: Mr. Masters has served as Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer of Albemarle since April 2020. He was previously a non-employee director of Albemarle from 2015 to 2020. Prior to joining Albemarle, he served as an Operating Partner of Advent International and as Chief Executive Officer of Foster Wheeler AG.

company_affiliations.name: Albemarle Corporation
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer
